title: Two more passengers evacuated from cruise ship test hantavirus+
summary_full: Passengers from the MV Hondius cruise ship, affected by a deadly hantavirus outbreak, are being repatriated and quarantined globally. A French woman and an American have tested positive, with the French passenger's health worsening. Health authorities are managing the situation, emphasizing low public risk and early treatment benefits.
